scripts.db:migrate: pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:seed: pnpm exec prisma db seed --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.test: pnpm --filter frontend test && pnpm --filter backend test
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @shared/types build && pnpm exec prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && pnpm --filter backend build && pnpm --filter frontend build
